'''fodhadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:waged|waged]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waged|waged]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fodhadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodhadhithi|fodhadhithi]] || [[word:fodhadhiji|fodhadhiji]] || [[word:fodhadhishi|fodhadhishi]] || [[word:fodhadhiki|fodhadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodhadhuthuthu|fodhadhuthuthu]] || [[word:fodhadhujuju|fodhadhujuju]] || [[word:fodhadhushushu|fodhadhushushu]] || [[word:fodhadhukuku|fodhadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodhadhuthu|fodhadhuthu]] || [[word:fodhadhuju|fodhadhuju]] || [[word:fodhadhushu|fodhadhushu]] || [[word:fodhadhuku|fodhadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodhadhufthuf|fodhadhufthuf]] || [[word:fodhadhufjuf|fodhadhufjuf]] || [[word:fodhadhufshuf|fodhadhufshuf]] || [[word:fodhadhufkuf|fodhadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodhadhethe|fodhadhethe]] || [[word:fodhadheje|fodhadheje]] || [[word:fodhadheshe|fodhadheshe]] || [[word:fodhadheke|fodhadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodhadhothotho|fodhadhothotho]] || [[word:fodhadhojojo|fodhadhojojo]] || [[word:fodhadhoshosho|fodhadhoshosho]] || [[word:fodhadhokoko|fodhadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodhadhotho|fodhadhotho]] || [[word:fodhadhojo|fodhadhojo]] || [[word:fodhadhosho|fodhadhosho]] || [[word:fodhadhoko|fodhadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodhadhofthof|fodhadhofthof]] || [[word:fodhadhofjof|fodhadhofjof]] || [[word:fodhadhofshof|fodhadhofshof]] || [[word:fodhadhofkof|fodhadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|fodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŠthĂŠ|fodhadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŠjĂŠ|fodhadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŠshĂŠ|fodhadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fodhadhĂŠkĂŠ|fodhadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fodhadhathatha|fodhadhathatha]] || [[word:fodhadhajaja|fodhadhajaja]] || [[word:fodhadhashasha|fodhadhashasha]] || [[word:fodhadhakaka|fodhadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fodhadhatha|fodhadhatha]] || [[word:fodhadhaja|fodhadhaja]] || [[word:fodhadhasha|fodhadhasha]] || [[word:fodhadhaka|fodhadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fodhadhafthaf|fodhadhafthaf]] || [[word:fodhadhafjaf|fodhadhafjaf]] || [[word:fodhadhafshaf|fodhadhafshaf]] || [[word:fodhadhafkaf|fodhadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fodhadhasha|fodhadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fodhadhshĂ«sha|fodhadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fodhadhrosha|fodhadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fodhadhmusha|fodhadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fodhadhyasha|fodhadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofodhadhnkshĂ«sha|gofodhadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofodhadhnkrosha|gofodhadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofodhadhnkmusha|gofodhadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofodhadhnkyasha|gofodhadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fodhadhadhasha|fodhadhadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fodhadhadhshĂ«sha|fodhadhadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fodhadhadhrosha|fodhadhadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fodhadhadhmusha|fodhadhadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fodhadhadhyasha|fodhadhadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofodhadhadhnkshĂ«sha|gofodhadhadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofodhadhadhnkrosha|gofodhadhadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofodhadhadhnkmusha|gofodhadhadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofodhadhadhnkyasha|gofodhadhadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fedhĂŠdhasha|fedhĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fedhĂŠdhshĂ«sha|fedhĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fedhĂŠdhrosha|fedhĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fedhĂŠdhmusha|fedhĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fedhĂŠdhyasha|fedhĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofedhĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gofedhĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofedhĂŠdhnkrosha|gofedhĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofedhĂŠdhnkmusha|gofedhĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofedhĂŠdhnkyasha|gofedhĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fodhfadhasha|fodhfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fodhfadhshĂ«sha|fodhfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fodhfadhrosha|fodhfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fodhfadhmusha|fodhfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fodhfadhyasha|fodhfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofodhfadhnkshĂ«sha|gofodhfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofodhfadhnkrosha|gofodhfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofodhfadhnkmusha|gofodhfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofodhfadhnkyasha|gofodhfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
